title: Tiger Totem of Undying
description: This texture pack replaces the Totem of Undying with a tiger.
body:
## Tiger Totem of Undying
**This texture pack completely transforms the totem of undying into a majestic tiger! Now, instead of the usual item, you'll be protected by a realistic tiger model. But that's not all! The regular experience orbs that appear when using the totem are replaced with charming tiger pelts, which you can even see on the end rod, adding a unique detail to your gameplay.**
